description: Use agent mode with browser MCP to navigate .NET web apps and static sites, then capture screenshots

placeholders.Project: path to .csproj (dotnet only, empty for static/wordpress)
placeholders.Port: localhost port for dotnet apps (empty for static)
placeholders.StaticPath: path to index.html or site root (static only, empty for dotnet)
placeholders.ScreenshotDir: absolute path to output directory for PNGs
